records.question: Which people have the name Hubert Henno and were born on 06.10.1976?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.name = 'Hubert Henno' AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976'
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Name = 'Hubert Henno' AND Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976'

records.question: Who in the people table has a height that is exactly 196.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.height = 196.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Height = 196.0

records.question: Which men who are no more than 188.0 cm tall and weigh at most 83.0 have a support rate of at most 0.25 in the WNBC/Marist Poll?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'M' AND people.weight <= 83.0 AND candidate.support_rate <= 0.25 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN candidate AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Sex = 'M' AND T1.Weight <= 83.0 AND T1.Height <= 188.0 AND T2.Support_rate <= 0.25 AND T2.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll'

records.question: Which people have a consider_rate of at most 0.34 as candidates?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.consider_rate <= 0.34
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN candidate AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T2.Consider_rate <= 0.34

records.question: What people born on 06.10.1976 with a weight of exactly 83.0 and height at most 188.0 have candidate data from WNBC/Marist Poll showing a consider rate of at most 0.3, unsure rate no more than 0.2, support rate at least 0.25, and oppose rate at least 0.43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.weight = 83.0 AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976' AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0 AND candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.2 AND candidate.support_rate >= 0.25 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.43
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 WHERE T1.Weight = 83.0 AND T1.Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976' AND T1.Height <= 188.0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM candidate AS T2 WHERE T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID AND T2.Consider_rate <= 0.3 AND T2.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND T2.Unsure_rate <= 0.2 AND T2.Support_rate >= 0.25 AND T2.Oppose_rate >= 0.43 )

records.question: Which people born exactly on 01.09.1977 weigh at most 88.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.weight <= 88.0 AND people.date_of_birth = '01.09.1977'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 WHERE T1.Weight <= 88.0 AND T1.Date_of_Birth = '01.09.1977' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM candidate AS T2 WHERE T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID )

records.question: Who is Laurent Capet with a weight of 92.0 where the FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll shows a support rate of 0.18, oppose rate of at least 0.44, unsure rate of at most 0.3, and consider rate of at most 0.34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll' AND people.weight = 92.0 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.44 AND people.name = 'Laurent Capet' AND candidate.support_rate = 0.18 AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.34
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN candidate AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Weight = 92.0 AND T1.Name = 'Laurent Capet' AND T2.Unsure_rate <= 0.3 AND T2.Poll_Source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll' AND T2.Oppose_rate >= 0.44 AND T2.Support_rate = 0.18 AND T2.Consider_rate <= 0.34

records.question: What female individuals have an oppose rate of exactly 0.32, an unsure rate of at least 0.9, and a consider rate of at most 0.42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'F' AND candidate.oppose_rate = 0.32 AND candidate.unsure_rate >= 0.9 AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.42
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN candidate AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Sex = 'F' AND T2.Oppose_rate = 0.32 AND T2.Unsure_rate >= 0.9 AND T2.Consider_rate <= 0.42
